headline: Move Over, SpaceX: Popular Companies from Lime to Oura Line Up for Market Debuts
summary: After a dry spell amid high interest rates and inflation uncertainty Q1 saw 35 IPOs raise $9.9 billion, according to Renaissance Capital.
